## Meeting Purpose

[Review content performance and discuss next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/sTuvCF9sMU7PMQD8H2vxFyDmeH8dfkzy?tab=summary&timestamp=567.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Content is performing well:** Engagement rates consistently exceed the 50% industry benchmark, with top-performing compliance content reaching 91%.](https://fathom.video/share/sTuvCF9sMU7PMQD8H2vxFyDmeH8dfkzy?tab=summary&timestamp=756.0)
  - **LLM performance is strong but has a clear gap:** Rapyd ranks \#6 overall (tied with Payoneer at 7% query share) with 96% positive sentiment, but a list of queries where competitors appear and Rapyd does not reveals a key opportunity.
  - [**New content is on track:** Competitor and country blogs are being finalized, with a batch due for review by EOW and the remainder next week.](https://fathom.video/share/sTuvCF9sMU7PMQD8H2vxFyDmeH8dfkzy?tab=summary&timestamp=597.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance (Looker)

  - [**Overall Sessions:** Trending up, driven by organic (Google, Bing) and LLM traffic (reported as referral).](https://fathom.video/share/sTuvCF9sMU7PMQD8H2vxFyDmeH8dfkzy?tab=summary&timestamp=699.0)
  - [**Engaged Sessions:** The primary success metric (10s+ on page or click-through).](https://fathom.video/share/sTuvCF9sMU7PMQD8H2vxFyDmeH8dfkzy?tab=summary&timestamp=743.0)
      - [Engagement rates consistently exceed the 50% industry benchmark.](https://fathom.video/share/sTuvCF9sMU7PMQD8H2vxFyDmeH8dfkzy?tab=summary&timestamp=797.0)
      - [Top performers reach 75%+ (e.g., Compliance cohort at 91%).](https://fathom.video/share/sTuvCF9sMU7PMQD8H2vxFyDmeH8dfkzy?tab=summary&timestamp=1053.0)
  - [**Top Performing Content:** Stablecoins, crypto, KYC, and the Swift alternative page.](https://fathom.video/share/sTuvCF9sMU7PMQD8H2vxFyDmeH8dfkzy?tab=summary&timestamp=822.0)
      - [**Action:** The top-performing Swift alternative page needs a refresh to address its recent performance decline.](https://fathom.video/share/sTuvCF9sMU7PMQD8H2vxFyDmeH8dfkzy?tab=summary&timestamp=854.0)
  - [**Cohort Performance:**](https://fathom.video/share/sTuvCF9sMU7PMQD8H2vxFyDmeH8dfkzy?tab=summary&timestamp=1037.0)
      - [**Cross-Border Payments:** Highest session volume last week.](https://fathom.video/share/sTuvCF9sMU7PMQD8H2vxFyDmeH8dfkzy?tab=summary&timestamp=1037.0)
      - [**Business Strategy Optimization:** Low engagement rate → requires a refresh.](https://fathom.video/share/sTuvCF9sMU7PMQD8H2vxFyDmeH8dfkzy?tab=summary&timestamp=1037.0)
  - [**Reporting Limitations:**](https://fathom.video/share/sTuvCF9sMU7PMQD8H2vxFyDmeH8dfkzy?tab=summary&timestamp=910.0)
      - [**Keyword Ranking:** Chart data is incomplete (cuts off in June) due to Google Search Console (GSC) access issues.](https://fathom.video/share/sTuvCF9sMU7PMQD8H2vxFyDmeH8dfkzy?tab=summary&timestamp=910.0)
      - [**Non-Branded Clicks:** Absolute numbers are incorrect due to Google's data restrictions, but the trend is reliable.](https://fathom.video/share/sTuvCF9sMU7PMQD8H2vxFyDmeH8dfkzy?tab=summary&timestamp=940.0)

### LLM Performance (Scrunch)

  - **Overall Ranking (12-week avg):** \#6 for non-branded queries.
      - [**Query Share:** 7% (tied with Payoneer).](https://fathom.video/share/sTuvCF9sMU7PMQD8H2vxFyDmeH8dfkzy?tab=summary&timestamp=1408.0)
      - [**Sentiment:** 96% positive.](https://fathom.video/share/sTuvCF9sMU7PMQD8H2vxFyDmeH8dfkzy?tab=summary&timestamp=1476.0)
  - [**Performance by Topic:**](https://fathom.video/share/sTuvCF9sMU7PMQD8H2vxFyDmeH8dfkzy?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)
      - **Card Issuing Management:** \#4.
      - **Cross-Border:** \#5.
  - [**Key Opportunity:** A list of queries where competitors appear but Rapyd does not.](https://fathom.video/share/sTuvCF9sMU7PMQD8H2vxFyDmeH8dfkzy?tab=summary&timestamp=1693.0)
      - [**Action:** Export this list for analysis.](https://fathom.video/share/sTuvCF9sMU7PMQD8H2vxFyDmeH8dfkzy?tab=summary&timestamp=1722.0)
      - [**Use Case:** Integrate these queries as FAQs or H2s/H3s in content to improve LLM visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/sTuvCF9sMU7PMQD8H2vxFyDmeH8dfkzy?tab=summary&timestamp=1739.0)

### New Content Pipeline

  - [**Competitor Blogs:** Updates are complete (removing industry-specific focus) and ready for review.](https://fathom.video/share/sTuvCF9sMU7PMQD8H2vxFyDmeH8dfkzy?tab=summary&timestamp=597.0)
  - [**Country Pages:** A batch is due for review by EOW; the remainder will follow next week.](https://fathom.video/share/sTuvCF9sMU7PMQD8H2vxFyDmeH8dfkzy?tab=summary&timestamp=597.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Vivek:** Export the Scrunch list of queries where competitors appear but Rapyd does not and send it to Mark.](https://fathom.video/share/sTuvCF9sMU7PMQD8H2vxFyDmeH8dfkzy?tab=summary&timestamp=1693.0)
  - [**Mark:** Review the queue of competitor blogs and provide feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/sTuvCF9sMU7PMQD8H2vxFyDmeH8dfkzy?tab=summary&timestamp=1905.0)
  - [**GrowthX:** Deliver the first batch of country pages for review by EOW.](https://fathom.video/share/sTuvCF9sMU7PMQD8H2vxFyDmeH8dfkzy?tab=summary&timestamp=628.0)
